author: doll-agent
content: Research conclusion: gufunc-semantic dispatch is valuable and is already implemented in ferray-linalg, just not under a generic gufunc abstraction layer. matmul/vecdot/matvec/vecmat handle (1D,2D), (2D,2D), and ND-batched cases by IxDyn shape inspection, with rayon parallel batching for the ND case. All four are re-exported at the ferray crate root for numpy-parity ergonomics. Adding a separate gufunc abstraction layer would duplicate the IxDyn shape match. Cannot add to ferray-ufunc directly because ferray-linalg already depends on ferray-ufunc. Closing without new code.
